hero.title: Your brand, our vertically integrated production.
hero.intro: From private labelling an existing catalogue line to developing a fully bespoke product from a blank brief, our facility handles it under one roof - tanning, cutting, stitching and finishing, all in Kanpur.
hero.imageAlt: Finished leather goods ready for dispatch at Kings International

modelsSection.heading: Four ways to engage, one production floor.

items.title: Private Labelling
items.body: Choose from our existing catalogue of belts, bags, saddlery and accessories, and we produce it under your brand - your branding, packaging and hang tags, our proven design.

items.title: Fully Custom Development
items.body: Send a brief, a sketch, or a physical sample. We build a pattern and a counter-sample for your approval, then move to bulk production once the design is locked.

items.title: Component Sourcing
items.body: Hardware, hides, linings and trims sourced to your specification, whether you need full production support or just the raw materials.

items.title: Export & Compliance Support
items.body: REACH-compliant chemicals, ISO 9001 quality management, and documentation support for buyers navigating export requirements into new markets.

whySection.heading: Vertically integrated, start to finish.
whySection.body: Because tanning, cutting, stitching, and finishing all happen within our own facility, we can hold consistency across a production run in a way that's harder to guarantee when a supply chain is split across multiple subcontractors - and we can move faster when a specification changes mid-development. We work with brands, wholesalers, distributors, retailers, and OEM partners of varying sizes, from a first trial order to a repeat seasonal programme.

cta.heading: Tell us your brief. We'll tell you what's realistic.
